message:
feat(agent,providers): bounded tool concurrency + OpenAI reasoning content streaming

Bounded tool concurrency:
- agent.rs: add MAX_CONCURRENT_TOOLS = 8 constant; replace unbounded
  futures::future::join_all() with stream::iter().buffered(MAX_CONCURRENT_TOOLS)
  for both abort-signal and normal execution paths — prevents resource
  exhaustion when extensions request many parallel tool calls

OpenAI reasoning content streaming (DeepSeek R1 support):
- openai.rs: add reasoning_content: Option<String> to OpenAIDelta struct;
  process delta.reasoning_content via ContentBlock::Thinking, emitting
  ThinkingStart/ThinkingDelta/ThinkingEnd stream events; proper ThinkingEnd
  alongside TextEnd in stream finalization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
